ocr_findings.description: 学習のポイント label appears as plain text 'ポイント' without the icon/badge styling — cosmetic only, text is present

reviewer_notes: Lesson 08-03 サービスサポート intro page with a 6-row table and a 学習のポイント callout. Table rows (インシデント管理 through サービスデスク) are fully captured with correct cell content. Body text faithfully reproduced. No missing text or character errors detected.
